summary: Added a Bot Command Matrix that gives every active bot a command-center card with lane state, thread id, gate pressure, review counts, urgency, suggested send, Comms drill-through, and local staging.

queries: command center dashboard bot orchestration UI patterns
AI agent dashboard task orchestration user interface patterns
operations command center dashboard design best practices agents
pattern_notes: Multi-agent command centers need shared state, visible ownership, and governance context so agents do not contradict one another unnoticed.
Goal-centered command centers reduce terminal/tab switching by surfacing goals, queues, and current state together.
Agent-management interfaces commonly combine dashboards, task lists, inboxes, and drill-downs so humans can intervene where needed.

ui_contract: Render one command-center card for every active bot in snapshot.agents.
Show online, ready-send, gated, and staged totals above the matrix.
Each card shows generated portrait, callsign, lane, state, thread id, gate pressure, blocker count, pending review count, urgency, and suggested command reason.
COM opens the lane Comms deck; Q stages the bot's top suggested command or falls back to the lane Comms draft.
The matrix is derived from the existing static snapshot and browser-local dispatch outbox; it sends no external messages.

checks.result: Bot Command Matrix panel rendered, 11 bot cards, 4 summary counters, 11/11 portraits loaded, one-column matrix, no horizontal overflow, and no console errors.
Bot Command Matrix panel rendered, 11 bot cards, 4 summary counters, 11/11 portraits loaded, four-column matrix, no horizontal overflow, and no console errors.
Bot Command Matrix panel rendered, 11 bot cards, 4 summary counters, 11/11 portraits loaded, five-column matrix, no horizontal overflow, and no console errors.

Clicking the paid_code_bounties Q action staged/refreshed a local command; paid-code button showed OK, dispatch count showed 8 staged, and summary text included 11 online, 11 ready sends, 7 gated, and 8 staged.
Clicking the paid_code_bounties COM action updated the hash to #lane=paid_code_bounties&view=comms and rendered Paid Code Bounties with Agent Comms and Command deck text.
